title: Coalistic
description: Make your fuels Coalistic. This mod adds coal variations to game. Try, enjoy it ;)
body:
# **Coalistic**
Make you fuels coalistic

The Coalistic mod enhances coal and charcoal experience by adding new coal and charcoal variations, enabling more efficient use of resources, allowing players to smelt more items with fewer stacks and less inventory problems.

## **Features**
- **Coal Piece** : Coal and Charcoal can be split into Coal Pieces, providing 1/8 the smelting power of regular coal.
- **Double Coal** : Coal can be upgraded into Double Coal using Coal Pieces, providing twice the smelting power of regular coal.
- **Double Charcoal** : This is charcoal version of Double Coal.
- **Triple Coal** : Double Coal can be further upgraded into Triple Coal using Coal Pieces, providing triple the smelting power of regular coal.
- **Triple Charcoal** : This is charcoal version of Triple Coal.
- **Quadruple Coal** : Triple Coal can be further upgraded into Quadruple Coal using Coal Pieces, providing quadruple the smelting power of regular coal.
- **Quadruple Charcoal** : This is charcoal version of Quadruple Coal.
## **Items**

## **Coal Bonuses**
| Coal and Charcoal Types | Burn Ticks | The number of items can be smelted(cooked) |
|:-----------------------:|:----------:|:------------------------------------------:|
| Coal Piece              | 200        | 1                                          |
| Double Coal             | 3200       | 16                                         |
| Double Charcoal         | 3200       | 16                                         |
| Triple Coal             | 4800       | 24                                         |
| Triple Charcoal         | 4800       | 24                                         |
| Quadruple Coal          | 6400       | 32                                         |
| Quadruple Charcoal      | 6400       | 32                                         |
